behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names S3_REPORT_BUCKET, S3_UPSTREAM_REPORT_BUCKET, _USER_DEFINED_SETTINGS, Settings class, TestCaseIssueCatalog, to_s3/from_s3 methods, and the requirement for a classmethod to download catalogs (tested as _download_catalog).

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to rename and add without giving exact line changes; agent must still figure out which files use the setting.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_download_catalog_method_exists asserts the exact internal method name '_download_catalog', but instruction only says 'Add a classmethod that downloads a catalog' — an alternative valid implementation naming it e.g. 'download_catalog' would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests import modules, call methods like to_s3(), and inspect class attributes, not just grep text.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require real attribute additions and method existence plus functional to_s3 behavior; a trivial stub wouldn't satisfy the combination.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover rename, new setting, merge method existence, and imports across modified modules.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have clear docstrings and a FAIL-TO-PASS section header.

no_typos.reason: Names consistent across instruction, tests, and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction references module areas but not specific line numbers.
